text: Case No: ENF 012/2009 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE Between

table_body:
SHEREEN ALDISIJudgment Creditor
And ORION HOLDING OVERSEAS LIMITEDJudgment Debtor

text: ORDER This application been called for hearing (as a return date for third party debt order) on this day before Honorable Judge Ali Al Madhani AND UPON the hearing IT IS ORDERED THAT:

1. The Judgment Debtor to make a payment into the DIFC Courts' account the sum of AED   
71,187 pending Court further order.
2. The third party debt order issued on 5 August 2009 to be discharged after the transfer of the sum is made into the Courts' account.
3. The parties are at liberty to submit such further applications and documents to the Court as they consider appropriate.
Ali Al Madhani Enforcement Judge Date of Issue: 3 September 2009 At: 2pm
